name: DataTable
comment:
data table component.
@docs table
    , ColumnMeta
    , EditorVisible
    , rowControlViews

aliases.name: ColumnMeta
aliases.type: { widthClass : String.String, label : String.String, html : row -> Html.Styled.Html msg }

values.name: rowControlViews
values.type: { showEditorForNew : msg, showEditorForUpdate : row -> msg, confirmDelete : row -> msg } -> { new : Html.Styled.Html msg, update : row -> Html.Styled.Html msg, delete : row -> Html.Styled.Html msg }

values.name: table
values.type: List.List (DataTable.ColumnMeta row msg) -> DataTable.FetchParam msg -> DataTable.FilterParam msg -> DataTable.EditorParam row msg -> DataTable.UpdateParam row msg -> (row -> String.String) -> List.List row -> Html.Styled.Html msg

name: Views
comment:
view components.

    , InputArg

    , defaultInputArg
    , defaultTextAreaArg

    , inputUnderLine

|

aliases.name: InputArg
aliases.type: { value : String.String, label : String.String, placeholder : String.String, type_ : String.String, attributes : List.List (Html.Styled.Attribute msg) }

values.name: backdrop
values.type: List.List (Html.Styled.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Styled.Html msg) -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: build
values.type: List.List (Views.ViewElement msg) -> List.List (Html.Styled.Html msg)

values.type: List.List String.String -> Html.Styled.Attribute msg

values.name: defaultInputArg
values.type: Views.InputArg msg

values.name: defaultTextAreaArg
values.type: Views.TextAreaArg msg

values.name: dialog
values.type: { body : List.List (Html.Styled.Html msg), headerElements : List.List (Html.Styled.Html msg), footerElements : List.List (Html.Styled.Html msg) } -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: dialogConfirmation
values.type: { title : String.String, cancel : msg, ok : msg, body : List.List (Html.Styled.Html msg) } -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: icon
values.type: Views.IconKind -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.type: String.String -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.type: msg -> Maybe.Maybe Views.SelectedFile -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.type: (Views.InputArg msg -> Views.InputArg msg) -> (String.String -> msg) -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: input2
values.type: Views.Input2RequiredArg msg -> (Views.Input2OptionalArg msg -> Views.Input2OptionalArg msg) -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.type: List.List (Html.Styled.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Styled.Html msg) -> Html.Styled.Html msg
